title: 'I don't make it easy': How Rory McIlroy won back-to-back Masters
content: After seeing a six-shot lead erased on Saturday, McIlroy still found a way to secure his second green jacket.﻿

title: Sources: Rivers out after three years with Bucks
content: Doc Rivers is departing as the head coach of the Milwaukee Bucks, but the franchise and Rivers are discussing whether he will move to an advisory role in the organization, sources said.

title: Rory prevails, becomes 4th to repeat at Masters
content: The green jacket is Rory McIlroy's again. He won the Masters on Sunday by one shot, becoming the first back-to-back winner since Tiger Woods in 2001-02.

title: Flagg's rookie season ends with sprained ankle
content: Cooper Flagg, the No. 1 pick and Rookie of the Year favorite, sustained the injury early in the second quarter of the Mavericks' regular-season finale.

title: Giannis vents about Bucks, won't rule out return
content: Giannis Antetokounmpo gave contradicting messages about his future after a disappointing Bucks season, expressing frustration with where they are while also not ruling out the possibility of a return.

title: Fans give KG big welcome in his return to Wolves
content: Timberwolves franchise icon Kevin Garnett made a special appearance for fan appreciation night in the team's regular-season finale Sunday, receiving a roar from the crowd and patting his heart with his hand after player introductions.

title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
content: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.

title: Yelich exits hurt as Brewers expecting 'bad news'
content: Christian Yelich left the Milwaukee Brewers' game against the Washington Nationals on Sunday with tightness in his left hamstring.

title: Ovi lauds Penguins but waves off farewell shakes
content: After Washington's 3-0 loss to Pittsburgh on Sunday, Capitals star Alex Ovechkin, considering retirement after the season, waved off potential farewell handshakes with Sidney Crosby and the rest of the Penguins, who lingered after the win to salute him.

title: 🏈 NFL draft: Seven prospects climbing boards
content: Dillon Thieneman and Monroe Freeling have drastically boosted their stock since the start of last season. Who else has climbed the board?

content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

content: The 1996 draft didn't produce a first-round QB, but the Jets found a playmaker with star power in Johnson.

title: MLB Bat Flip Championship Belt: Who's the first winner of 2026?
content: We're going to name a bat flip champion for 2026. Here's who holds the championship belt after the first battle of the season.

title: Gibbs family revels in Ty's first Cup Series victory
content: Ty Gibbs, 23, the grandson of Hall of Fame team owner Joe Gibbs, outdueled Ryan Blaney and Kyle Larson in overtime on Sunday at Bristol Motor Speedway in Tennessee, breaking through for his first NASCAR Cup Series victory in his 131st start.

title: From Cyndi Lauper to 'The Man': The evolution of women's wrestling at WrestleMania
content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: King's gambit: Why NBA players are turning to chess
content: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg won the UFC light heavyweight championship, but an obstacle may prevent him from defending it anytime soon.

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back, what's next for the glamour division?
content: Tyson Fury won and called out Anthony Joshua, and with Deontay Wilder back, the heavyweight division is buzzing.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Man City must act fast for Sandro Tonali
content: Newcastle have issued their terms for a Sandro Tonali move, with Arsenal and Man City showing interest. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Those hit by SIR deletions may see their other rights diluted: Prashant Bhushan
content: Yogendra Yadav warned that the removal of the names of lakhs of voters through the SIR exercise may extend beyond electoral disenfranchisement and impact other identity-linked rights

title: Zero tolerance for harassment; staff accused in Nashik harassment case suspended, says TCS
content: The clarification comes in the wake of allegations of sexual harassment and forced religious conversion by eight female employees at the multinational company's office in Nashik

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Cash-for-votes storm dims Sobha Surendran’s sheen
content: Jamaat-e-Islami serves legal notice on Sobha Surendran for blaming it for the murder of RSS leader Sreenivasan in Palakkad on April 16, 2022

title: Lessons from the 1970s help U.S. and global economies absorb oil shocks
content: Economies are less vulnerable now than they were when a similar war in West Asia drove up fuel prices, triggering stagflation in the 1970s; decades of reforms have improved efficiency, cut reliance on West Asian oil, built reserves, and expanded alternative energy, but oil is still king, say experts

title: MoS Margherita attends mourning ceremony for late Iranian leader Ayatollah Khamenei
content: The ceremony was organised by the Iranian embassy on Sunday (April 12, 2026) to pay respect to the departed leader on the 40th day (Chehelum) of his demise

title: Poll-bound Tamil Nadu among top performers in many indicators | Data
content: The State’s performance exceeds the national average across various social and education-related indicators; however, it is a mixed bag in other indicators

title: Minor’s murder in Kadapa reflects ‘worsening women’s safety’, says Jagan
content: The increasing attacks on women point to ‘serious lapses in governance and law enforcement’, says the former Chief Minister

title: Khazipet murder case: mother of accused claims his innocence
content: Addressing the media in Khazipet of Kadapa district on Sunday, Ms. Sujatha claimed that she was not aware of her son’s relationship with the minor girl

title: Congress moves Supreme Court against cancellation of Ponda Assembly bypoll in Goa
content: The Bombay High Court’s Goa bench quashed the ECI’s notification for bypoll in Ponda, citing violation of the Representation of the People Act, as the legislature’s term is set to expire in less than a year

title: Local polls: Those who consider Gujarat's people 'fools' will be routed, says Dy CM Sanghavi
content: Elections to 34 district panchayats, 260 taluka panchayats, 84 municipalities and 15 civic corporations, including Ahmedabad, Surat and Vadodara, will be held on April 26. Counting of votes is scheduled for April 28

title: Samajwadi Party to hold Vision India dialogues across U.P.
content: The meetings to be addressed by the party president, Akhilesh Yadav, aim to create a consensus on the development agenda ahead of the Assembly elections in the State

title: India rejects China’s ‘mischievous attempts’ to assign ‘fictitious’ names to places in Arunachal Pradesh
content: The External Affairs Ministry said China should refrain from actions which inject negativity into relations and undermine efforts to create better understanding

title: Software engineer from Vizianagaram drowns in U.S. river on his birthday
content: Singireddy Sai Krishna, 29, a software engineer from Bobbili in Vizianagaram district, drowns in the Meramec river in Missouri while celebrating his birthday

title: Are biomass stoves a cleaner, cheaper alternative to LPG?
content: Can modern cookstoves turn the return of firewood into a sustainable alternative during the LPG crisis?

title: Bird flu outbreak confirmed in Kottayam district
content: Preventive measures have been intensified after H5N1 was confirmed in ward 16 of Udayanapuram grama panchayat in Vaikom taluk

title: Display of LPG, CNG prices and stock made mandatory in Dharwad district of Karnataka
content: Committee comprising officials from Legal Metrology Department, Food and Civil Supplies Department, representatives of gas bunk owners, and auto drivers’ associations to submit daily report

title: Cancer courses through the Ghaggar
content: Villages along Haryana’s Ghaggar river, especially Sirsa and Fatehabad, claim a surge in cancer cases, allegedly linked to contaminated water. This issue has sparked concern in Parliament and the State Assembly, with Sirsa’s political representatives demanding urgent action. However, tackling this crisis is proving tough, due to the absence of reliable data on cancer patients in the State and inadequate treatment facilities, particularly in Sirsa

title: What is the SIR controversy in West Bengal | Explained
content: How many names have been deleted from the electoral rolls, and why? What are the logical discrepancies identified by the ECI? Why were large numbers of voters placed under adjudication, and how was this resolved? How has the SIR process reshaped the State’s political contest?

title: Prakasam Collector directs officials to replicate ‘Palle Nidra’ village night stay across mandals
content: Prakasam Collector P. Raja Babu directs RDOs and Tahsildars to adopt the ‘Palle Nidra’ programme across mandals after a village night stay in Darsi mandal

title: Woman Maoist killed in encounter in Chhattisgarh’s Kanker
content: The face-off comes 12 days after the government declared Chhattisgarh free of armed Maoists on March 31

title: LDF will return to power for a third consecutive term with more than 90 seats, says M.V. Govindan
content: CPI(M) State secretary refutes speculation that a high polling percentage in the Assembly elections might be an indicator of a change in government

title: BJP will bring inclusive government in Bengal, says Adityanath
content: Mr. Adityanath said there is no appeasement in Uttar Pradesh, but “inclusive Hinduism”, where every community can live peacefully in a secure environment

title: India boosts 5-kg LPG supply, accelerates PNG rollout amid West Asia disruption
content: The government has prioritised LPG supply to domestic households at the cost of cuts in supplies to commercial users like hotels and restaurants

title: Tamil Nadu election: TVK leader Sengottaiyan’s nomination accepted after being kept on hold
content: When Mr. Sengottaiyan’s nomination papers were taken up, representatives of AIADMK candidate V.B. Prabhu raised objections, pointing to alleged discrepancies in the affidavit.

title: I do not see the Assembly election in Tamil Nadu as a close contest, says CM Stalin
content: The contest is essentially between the DMK-led front and the AIADMK-led alliance. Our achievements and electoral promises have captured the imagination of the people. The outcome will disprove the notion that the DMK cannot win two consecutive elections, says the DMK president

title: No close contest; the fight is between DMK and AIADMK, says CM Stalin
content: Surrendering State’s rights and adjusting with the Centre is slavery; DMK government’s welfare schemes and its election manifesto have already earned widespread public appreciation, says Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Stalin

title: Asha Bhosle: the voice that defied genres, time
content: Asha’s voice felt like a friend, a co-conspirator, or a mirror — someone who had been through the messiness of life and still chose to sing, dance, and seduce with full-throated joy; the most-recorded artist will be remembered for her fearless spirit, versatility, and playful charm

title: Noida drowning: FIR filed against three friends of deceased student
content: Police said the four had gone on a picnic to the site after their examinations ended. The sections of law invoked in the FIR are yet to be disclosed by police

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: party manifestos
content: This is a compilation of poll manifestos released by prominent political parties in Tamil Nadu ahead of the State Assembly election scheduled to be held on April 23, 2026

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: CPI manifesto promises to fight commercialisation of drinking water, agriculture and irrigation
content: The CPI said it would ensure the development of micro, small and medium industries and prevent the commercialisation of drinking water, agriculture and irrigation

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Poll fever rises as political merchandise sales peak in Tiruchi
content: The merchandise is priced upwards of ₹20, depending on size and material; most shops maintain social media accounts to advertise their latest additions

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections: How actively does Chennai vote? A look at the trends
content: In 2011, a year of higher participation across the State, the city recorded 67.47%, still some distance from the State average. However, that momentum did not carry forward. In the elections that followed, the turnout dropped, and has since remained largely unchanged, staying in the range of 61%-62%

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Naam Tamilar Katchi’s transgender candidate Roshini vows to make Villivakkam a model constituency
content: She says the prevention of drug abuse among youngsters and ensuring women’s welfare will be her first priority if elected; there are plans to create playgrounds and fine arts centres to revive vanishing art forms; both the Dravidian majors have neglected issues for several decades, she adds

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: State Home Secretary appoints Durai Kumar as DVAC in-charge after ECI reshuffle
content: Citing the officer’s past social media posts hailing the RSS and criticising the Left, and certain accusations of corruption against him, DMK sought reconsideration of the EC’s direction to appoint Mr. Mittal to the sensitive post

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: K. Manivasan to be State’s Home Secretary
content: Incumbent Dheeraj Kumar is to be tranferred out and not to be appointed to any election-related post until the completion of the polls, the ECI said in its communication

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: DMK demands reinstatement of N. Muruganandam as Chief Secretary
content: The party also strongly objected to the appointment of Sandeep Mittal as DGP (Armed Police and Vigilance and Anti-Corruption), alleging that Mr. Mittal was a supporter of the BJP and the RSS

title: Support Women’s Reservation Bill amendments: PM to parties
content: In response to the Prime Minister’s letter, Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge questioned the timing of bringing in the amendments and pointed to the lack of consultations on legislation that would deeply affect the federal structure

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Arun shifted, Modak appointed Chennai Police Commissioner
content: The EC directed that Mr. Arun should not be posted in any election-related posts till the completion of the Assembly election

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Whistles fly off the shelf this poll season in Chennai
content: Manufacturers and retailers are reporting a sharp increase in the sale of whistle, the symbol allotted by the Election Commission of India to actor C. Joseph Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri  Kazhagam in the 2026 Assembly election

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Vijay returns without addressing poll campaign in Karaikudi
content: A Flying Squad team checked the charter flight at the Tiruchi international airport in which Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam founder and actor Vijay was to leave for Chennai.

title: Consolidated voters’ list of 9 States and 3 UTs that underwent SIR Phase II trimmed by 10.2%
content: Uttar Pradesh records highest net deletion of voters in absolute numbers at 2.04 crore while Lakshadweep sees lowest at 181.

title: Puducherry Assembly election 2026: High enthusiasm, long queues mark polling as the Union Territory shatters record
content: There were no major complaints pertaining to polling process; however, there were allegations of voter inducement and reports of minor scuffles from two constituencies during the early hours of polling.

title: People across Tamil Nadu want a change, there is anti-incumbency: AIADMK leader-candidate D. Jayakumar
content: Former Minister D. Jayakumar says every party in the alliance has its own ideology, but the AIADMK will not be influenced by them. Confident of a win because of the party’s strong voter base and coalition votes, the Royapuram candidate promises to develop infrastructure and fulfil the people’s needs

title: If Centre stops assistance or grants, we will not accept it: AIADMK leader-candidate K.P. Munusamy
content: It’s true that we backed the farm laws that had benefits for farmers, but it was Edappadi K. Palaniswami who stalled the project for the extraction of mineral resources in the delta, says the AIADMK deputy general secretary

title: Kochi Corpn. seeks govt. fundsto repair uneven stretches along metro corridor
content: Civic body not in a position to mobilise ₹14 crore needed to resurface S.A. Road, says Mayor; work to prevent concrete blocks from falling onto the road below Elamkulam station is likely to begin soon

title: College Students Wanted Lavish Life. They Kidnapped Classmate With Fake Gun
content: The accused lured the victim out of his hostel, forced him into a car and then took him to one of the students' room.

title: Got Rs 100 To Invest? Here's How To Split It Between Shares, Gold And FD
content: Iran War Impact: Investors are selling assets like equities. Even gold, which usually acts as a hedge during times of uncertainty, is fluctuating.

title: Cars Burnt, Roads Blocked: Haryana Move Sparks Noida Workers' Protest
content: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath has directed authorities to take strict action against anti-social elements trying to instigate workers.

title: Investors Lose Rs 4 Lakh Crore: Three Reasons Behind Market Crash Today
content: Stock Market Crash: Within an hour of the beginning of the trading session, investors lost over Rs 4 trillion.

title: Why Trump Wants To Block Hormuz, Already In Iran's Grip. How Will It Work
content: Any US blockade is likely to inflict economic damage on Tehran, which would ultimately undermine its ability to continue fighting over the long term by denying it the ability to export oil and earn revenue.

title: AI Use Rises At Workplaces, But Employees Still Choose Not To Use It: Report
content: New Gallup polling finds that while more employees are using AI frequently in their work, there's been an uptick in alarm that new technologies will replace their jobs.

title: "Alter Course, Go Back": Iran's "Last Warning" Video To US Warship In Hormuz
content: The US announced on Saturday that two guided-missile destroyers, USS Frank E Petersen Jr and USS Michael Murphy, transited Strait of Hormuz.

title: "That's Not Going To Play Too Well": Trump Nearly Named Gulf Of Mexico After Himself
content: US President Donald Trump formally changed the name of the Gulf of Mexico to Gulf of America in January last year.

title: 'f(f(O))>f(O)': Iran's 'Mathematical' Warning To US Over Hormuz Blockade Threat
content: US President Donald Trump has said the American Navy would swiftly begin a blockade of ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran ceasefire talks in Pakistan ended without an agreement.

title: 'Delimitation, Not Women Quota, Real Issue': Sonia Gandhi On Special Session
content: Sonia Gandhi has said Centre wants to "bulldoze in a special session of Parliament when the election campaign in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal will be at its peak"

title: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: US To Begin Blockade Of All Iran Ports In Hormuz Today
content: US-Iran-Israel War LIVE: US President Donald Trump said that Iran "lies" as they had promised to open the Strait of Hormuz but did not.

title: Roman Gofman, Who Has No Intelligence Experience, Becomes New Mossad Chief
content: Major General Roman Gofman, an army officer with no prior intelligence background, will assume the role on June 2, 2026.

title: "Iran's In Bad Shape, Desperate": Trump After Failed Islamabad Talks
content: The US military will begin implementing a blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz today at around 7:30 pm (IST).

title: US says Hormuz blockade starts today, targets Iranian ports; why China will be most affected
content: US forces are enforcing a blockade on vessels entering or leaving Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz, a move experts deem an act of war. This directly impacts China, the largest buyer of Iranian oil, and could cripple Iran's economy. While India's direct exposure is minimal, global energy markets face significant disruption.

title: Noida salary hike protest turns violent: Vehicles torched, properties vandalised, one set ablaze
content: Factory workers in Noida's Phase 2 protested violently over low wages, vandalizing vehicles and setting one ablaze. The unrest followed days of demonstrations demanding a salary hike, prompting the district administration to announce new safeguards including compulsory weekly offs, double overtime pay, and a harassment complaints system.

title: ‘IPL a movie?’: Jacob Oram bursts out laughing as PSL presser goes viral - Watch
content: Islamabad United assistant coach Jacob Oram reacted with laughter to Rilee Rossouw's comment that the IPL feels like a movie compared to the PSL. Oram acknowledged both leagues have similarities and differences. He expressed his enjoyment of his first PSL experience. Rossouw's statement sparked debate about the two cricket leagues.

title: How Anthropic’s new AI tool for Microsoft Word may be ‘problem’ for Copilot
content: AI startup Anthropic has launched Claude for Word, a specialized add-in targeting legal and financial professionals. This tool brings advanced AI intelligence directly into Microsoft Word, offering features like style preservation and tracked changes.  Meanwhile, Microsoft is enhancing its own M365 Copilot with deeper integration across its suite, focusing on context-aware assistance and advanced document manipulation.

title: Oil shock and war jitters: Where should investors put their money?
content: Middle East tensions are sending shockwaves through global markets, with oil prices soaring above $100 and Indian equities plummeting.  The Strait of Hormuz's vulnerability and trade route disruptions are fueling investor anxiety. Experts advise caution, emphasizing disciplined monthly investments via SIPs rather than market timing, as geopolitical risks overshadow earnings.

title: Microsoft VP says even if firms lays off 50% workforce due to AI, business will increase
content: Microsoft's Rajesh Jha counters fears of an AI-driven software slump, arguing that AI agents will require their own licenses.  He posits that as companies deploy thousands of these digital assistants, the number of 'paying users' could actually surge, even as human workforces shrink. This perspective challenges the notion that AI will diminish software revenue by reducing human users.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' becomes first Hindi film to cross Rs 1,700 crore mark
content: Dhurandhar 2 has achieved a remarkable Rs 1,712.98 crore worldwide in just 25 days, becoming the first Bollywood film to hit Rs 1,700 crore in Phase 1 without a Gulf release. Despite a dip after its strong opening, the spy-action flick's primary Hindi market drove its impressive India net collection of Rs 1,083.67 crore.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: IPL 2026: Will Romi Bhinder be allowed in RR dugout for SRH clash today?
content: Rajasthan Royals face a dugout controversy as team manager Romi Bhinder's mobile phone usage during a match is under BCCI review. The "PMOA Protocol - 2026" reportedly restricts such use. Officials are examining footage before deciding if Bhinder can be in the dugout for their next game, sparking debate on protocol adherence.

title: Kohli-Rohit moment wins hearts: Viral Wankhede clip steals the show — Watch
content: India legends Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma shared a heartwarming on-field moment during their IPL 2026 clash. Despite injury concerns for both legends during the match, RCB posted a massive 240/4, powered by Phil Salt's 78 and Rajat Patidar's 53. MI fought back but fell short, finishing at 222/5 despite Sherfane Rutherford's unbeaten 71.

title: Sonam Wangchuk says no date for next round of talks with govt announced
content: Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk warns of deepening divisions due to stalled talks with the Centre, over two months since the last dialogue. He highlights growing disillusionment and the risk of social discord, urging timely action from the Prime Minister and Home Minister.  Wangchuk's release had raised hopes for constructive dialogue on demands for statehood and Sixth Schedule status.

title: 2 supertankers carrying Iran crude anchor off India as Trump announces Hormuz blockade
content: Two supertankers carrying Iranian crude have anchored off India's coasts, signaling a potential return of imports after a seven-year hiatus. This development occurs despite US efforts to restrict Tehran's oil exports, with India seeking to diversify its energy sources amid global supply disruptions. The shipments arrive under a recent US waiver, allowing purchases of cargoes already in transit.

title: This Made-in-India gas stove is priced at Rs 1,50, 000 per unit: What makes it so expensive
content: Amidst the LPG crisis, an Indian firm has developed a revolutionary hydrogen cooking stove. This plug-and-play unit uses water and electricity to generate green hydrogen on-demand, offering a zero-emission, quiet cooking solution. Priced at Rs 1,50,000, it's currently targeted for commercial and institutional use, marking a significant step towards alternative energy in kitchens.

title: Nashik TCS unit suspends accused employees: 'Sexual harassment, forced conversion' case snowballs
content: TCS confirmed suspending employees accused of sexual harassment and forced religious conversion at its Nashik office. Eight women alleged mistreatment, with police forming a Special Investigation Team and arresting seven individuals. The IT giant stated its zero-tolerance policy and commitment to employee safety, while cooperating fully with the ongoing investigation.

title: Big scare for RCB: Kohli stays off the field during MI innings, Patidar gives update
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru secured a vital win against Mumbai Indians, but concern grew as Virat Kohli did not take the field with an ankle issue. Despite the scare, skipper Rajat Patidar suggested that Kohli is likely fine. Kohli's half-century, however, etched his name in history as he became the first to score 1000 runs against MI.

title: Rupee falls 48 paise to 93.31 against dollar as US-Iran peace talks fail
content: The Indian Rupee has fallen sharply against the US dollar. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East are intensifying, causing oil prices to rise above $100 per barrel. Investor sentiment has turned cautious as ceasefire hopes fade. Foreign investors are withdrawing funds from Indian equities amid global uncertainty. Experts advise disciplined monthly investments through SIPs.

title: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 opens below 23,600; BSE Sensex down over 1,500 points
content: Stock market crash today: Indian stock market benchmark indices, Nifty50 and BSE Sensex, tanked in opening trade on Monday as fresh geopolitical tensions weigh on sentiment, following the collapse of US-Iran peace talks and a sharp rise in oil prices.

title: 'Madly in love with her': Bengaluru BCom student dies by suicide, blames lover in death note
content: A 24-year-old BCom graduate allegedly died by suicide in Bengaluru, leaving a note accusing his lover of betrayal after a 6-7 year relationship. The woman reportedly ended the relationship due to parental disapproval, leading to a police compromise. Abhishek reportedly informed his lover via video call and WhatsApp before his death.

title: 'Weak on crime': Trump slams Pope Leo over 'enough of war' remark on Iran
content: President Trump sharply criticized Pope Leo XIV, labeling him "weak on crime" and "terrible for foreign policy." Trump accused the pontiff of being soft on Iran's nuclear ambitions and opposing US military actions, while the Pope had called for peace and dialogue amid global conflicts.

title: Pakistan: BLA carries out first-ever attack on Coast Guard boat near Iran border, 3 killed
content: Three Pakistan Coast Guard personnel were killed in a brazen attack by Baloch fighters on a patrol boat near the Iran border. The Balochistan Liberation Army claimed responsibility, calling it a "new phase" of operations. This incident escalates concerns over rising militant activity in the restive Balochistan region, with security forces now on high alert along the coast.

title: Asian stocks slide: HSI, Kospi, Nikkei fall 1% amid Iran war; Singapore holds firm
content: Asian markets faced a downturn due to Middle East conflict fears, with oil prices soaring. However, Singapore's stock market shows remarkable resilience, nearing record highs. This strength is attributed to the safe-haven appeal of the Singapore dollar and supportive domestic policies, offering a stark contrast to regional volatility.

title: Bengaluru: 45-year-old woman stabbed to death by nephew, his associates
content: A 45-year-old woman, Mageshwari, died after being stabbed by her nephew and his associates following a family dispute. The attack occurred when Mageshwari intervened as her nephew attempted to forcibly take his estranged wife from her home. Police have arrested four individuals and upgraded the case to murder.

title: Rajat Patidar equals Adam Gilchrist’s 17-year-old record with a blazing knock
content: Rajat Patidar etched his name in IPL history, smashing a blistering 53 off 20 balls against Mumbai Indians. His half-century in just 17 deliveries equalled Adam Gilchrist's 2009 record for the fastest captain's fifty. Patidar's aggressive knock, featuring multiple sixes, was a highlight of RCB's dominant 240/4, showcasing his captaincy prowess.

title: 'He urinated in bucket & threw it on me': How Savita Pradhan fought abuse to become IAS
content: Savitri Pradhan, a victim of severe domestic abuse and abandonment, overcame immense hardship to become an IAS officer. Despite facing violence, poverty, and lack of support, she pursued education relentlessly. Her journey, marked by resilience and determination, serves as a powerful testament to overcoming adversity and achieving prestigious goals against all odds.

title: 'I would hate to do it': Trump weighs limited Iran strikes after negotiation talks collapse
content: President Trump is considering limited military strikes and a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after Iran talks collapsed over its nuclear program. While a full bombing campaign is less likely, a temporary blockade is being weighed. Trump indicated a willingness for diplomacy but also threatened Iran's infrastructure.

title: CIA used Pegasus spyware to mislead Iran during airman rescue: Report
content: The CIA reportedly used Israeli-made Pegasus spyware in a deception campaign to rescue a downed US airman in Iran. Fake messages were sent to Iranian forces, misleading them about the airman's location. The agency also allegedly employed a classified 'Ghost Murmur' technology to detect the airman's heartbeat from afar, a claim met with some skepticism.

title: Candidates Chess: How Vaishali crashed into the Chinese wall in Round 12
content: India's Vaishali Rameshbabu suffered a significant setback in the FIDE Candidates, losing to China's Zhu Jiner and relinquishing her sole lead. The Women's section is now wide open with both players tied at the top. Meanwhile, Javokhir Sindarov is on the cusp of becoming the challenger in the Open section, needing just a draw in his next match.

title: Andhra Pradesh techie drowns in US river during birthday outing with friends
content: A young software professional from Andhra Pradesh, Singireddy Sai Sree Hari Krishna, tragically drowned in Missouri's Meramec River while celebrating his birthday. Pulled down by underwater weeds, the 26-year-old's body was recovered by emergency crews. This marks the second such incident involving an Andhra youth in the US within two months, leaving his family and village in profound shock.

title: ‘Raja Shivaji’ anthem delayed in tribute to Asha Bhosle
content: In a heartfelt homage to the beloved Asha Bhosle, who left us at the age of 92, Riteish Deshmukh has decided to push back the release of the anthem 'Chhatrapati' from his eagerly awaited film 'Raja Shivaji'. Initially slated for April 13, 2026, the launch will now be postponed to honor the legendary vocalist's remarkable legacy. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for this week - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Mtar Technologies, and Syrma SGS have been picked as the top stocks to buy in the holiday-shortened trading week starting from April 13, 2026, by Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk. Let’s look at the details:

title: Melanie Collins drops beach snap, gives glimpse of relaxing offseason
content: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.

title: Andreescu’s serve error hands Putintseva win, dents Canada hopes
content: Bianca Andreescu’s missed serve on match point helped Kazakhstan defeat Canada 3-1 in the Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers in Astana. Yulia Putintseva sealed the win in a tight three-set match. Kazakhstan advanced to the 2026 Finals, while Canada will now play in the Playoffs as Andreescu continues her comeback season.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry make noble move, continue giving back
content: Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, sparked shockwaves when he ended his decade long partnership with Under Armour in 2025, after over 10 years of being with the brand exclusively. While Stephen Curry remained vague about the reason behind it, it seems there was a pretty noble thought that led to this decision and his wife, Ayesha Curry, has been a supporter through all of it.

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: UFC 327 takeaways: Ulberg blew out his knee, but Procházka blew his title chance
content: Carlos Ulberg grabbed the light heavyweight championship out of the jaws of defeat at UFC 327 in Miami on sunday . the heavyweights on the main card, Josh Hokit and Curtis Blaydes, put on a slugfest for the ages . a former Bellator MMA star who had a horrible debut proved first impressions aren't everything .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: Tottenham's relegation looks increasingly inevitable after loss at Sunderland
content: 1-0 defeat to sunderland means they will end a weekend in the relegation zone . it is the first time they have been in the bottom three this late in the season in premier league history . appointing a new manager as lauded as Roberto De Zerbi is set against the dawning realization that one of the Premier League's traditional powerhouses might actually go down .

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .

title: News: George Springer fractures toe; O's Adley Rutschman to IL
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the final game of the fantasy week features the Atlanta Braves hosting the Cleveland Guardians at 7:20 p.m. ET . Jeremy Pena was lifted from the contest with a sore right knee .

content: the 2026 playoffs are set to begin on saturday . the playoff bracket isn't set yet . eight teams from each conference reach the first round and face off in a best-of-seven series to advance .
